item.dc:creator: UncleSlam123

item.title: Some good news even in the worst timeline
item.description: Results from this trial of 29 patients showed an average slowing of the disease by 75%. While the researchers are trying to remain cautiously optimistic, it's impossible not to see the emotion and excitement they have at such an incredible result. This could be a game-changer for those suffering from this horrendous disease. Source: https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cevz13xkxpro Youtube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bhExSMZt1zs
item.dc:creator: CourtRedHanded

item.description: Why are tourism numbers down?
item.dc:creator: CptCheesePants

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1486 (sparklesparrow)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Biscuits are baked, like bread. Running low on bread memes again.
Probably should have saved this for a Wizardpost but eh.
Sparklesparrow.
No, but i have had coffee sourced from Laos and it was pretty damn good.
The stakeout yesterday was a bust, as far as lost Arctic gulls and terns go. I didn't have even One Good Tern, let alone another. But the Eared Grebes, Cassin's Vireos, and White-crowned Sparrows had arrived for the winter practically overnight.
Honestly, that would be better than any stripper story I might have.
This is what the Protestant Revolution has gotten us: the debasing of Ska Day. Along with Christofacism.
This is an obscure theology joke.
I'm probably a cryptid. Or a flock of birds.
They are also immune to damage from spices.
Really, this is the boss of any southwestern tourist town in Arizona or New Mexico.
This happened in the First Punic War. He got angry at the omens given by the sacred chickens so he threw them overboard and lost the battle the next day to the Carthaginian Fleet.
As Lemondrop says, "unmake me."
Today has been decided that it's cleaning day. The stars have aligned.
And yet when I open up it feels like sometimes I am told I need to get over my past. My people, i'm only able to open up about the darkness in my history because I have done the work to get over it. If you don't want **the lore**, don't ask.
Pippin is a Coelurosaur nibbling on my ear right now.
Eat a billionaire.
Accurate
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "oh. Pippin. Pippin. What the fuck. Pippin. Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Walking today. With weights on hands and ankles. Also wearing weighted vest.
item.description: So yesterday was a bit different because I also had 1 pound weights on my hands. It was difficult in the beginning because I wasn't use to it. Had to catch my balance and get re-centered. A few weeks back I hurt my knee and its taken around a month to get it feeling better. I hope everyone is doing well and having a great day.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.description: Stop looking left and right, look up
item.dc:creator: n0n53n53

item.title: ICE dipshit doing dipshit things
item.description: Most viral edit: thanks for the upvotes. Side note: I’ve been reading about recruitment in the Nazi era and how they faced challenges finding good soldiers. For some reason, the job attracted dirtbags, violent criminals, and failed or wannabe cops. What an odd coincidence that ICE also faces similar hiring challenges. I’m sure it’s just a fluke
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: HOT dogs
item.description: ( I don't perceive any bad conditions/training situations "on purpose" for dogs in this video, but I often get some comment. Sorry in advance if I missed shit. I tried! ) I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!

item.title: Fitness update
item.description: I want to work on toning my tummy in the upcoming few months and I’ll post another update of my progress then! Good luck to anyone reading this who is also working on their bodies. It’s a long process but it’s quite fulfilling and great for the endorphins >:)

When the deck is full. Amiright ;;)
OH LAWD!

mom vrs Goku! Next time on dragonmyballsZ Front page edit... This one is for that one comment with the gif... Was the front page worth it.. I don't even know anymore

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Invincibility - Part 3
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Tia in her Tutu. Tia showing off her adorable Halloween costume. I'm sorry I missed yesterday's post. Luna isn't doing very well and I can't currently get her into the vet. My days have been very busy and very stressful. Still, I missed my post, so as an apology, I've added two new albums to the Kofi of Tiabeanie in her tutu and guinea pig costumes from 2023. https://ko-fi.com/theunnamedpoet All pet pictures are 100% free for everyone to enjoy!
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Ten ToolGifs you may have missed lately.
item.description:
Of a broom.
Repairing a Burst Sewer Pipe with the Freezing Method.
Operating track camera during a relay race.
Two-stroke shovel.
You've never seen signatures like this before.
Laser Weeder.
Field Marking Robot.
Screen printing.
PVC gutter extruder. As always, I learned A LOT watching those vids. And they're amazing ! Enjoy, have fun.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @TheCrochetedSunflower made this hobbit wreath and it's cool.
27 Man Tax: Wentworth Miller
“Nature is busy creating absolutely unique individuals, whereas culture has invented a single mold to which all must conform. It is grotesque.” - U.G. Krishnamurti I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, thank you so much.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Kid outruns security and steals the ball, core memory unlocked
